robots_evidence: 200; user-agent * disallows configuration, search, account, API, static, and query-format paths; /archives-records is not disallowed.
notes: Robots-first probe; no bytes retained.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits /archives-records for user-agent *.
notes: Official page title 'Archives & Records — Colville Tribes'; it deliberately links the Research Permit Application, Research Regulation Ordinance Process, Chapter 6-6 PDF, and resolutions. A /legal-services link was observed; no automated-use restriction was observed on this page. Publication intent confirmed; document acquisition remains subject to terms review and clearance.

robots_evidence: 200; user-agent * disallows /wp-admin/ except admin-ajax.php and specifies crawl-delay 10; candidate path is permitted.
notes: Robots-first probe; no bytes retained.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits the candidate path; 10-second crawl-delay was exceeded.
notes: Washington State Department of Commerce page title matches the register title and describes the signed MOU. A privacy-information link was observed; no automated-use restriction was observed on the page. Publication intent confirmed as a deliberately published state account, not the Nation's own copy.

robots_evidence: HTTP 403 to the robots.txt request; robots permission could not be established.
notes: Robots-first probe. No further probing of this host is authorized in this lane.

robots_evidence: Prior robots.txt request returned HTTP 403; permission was not established.
notes: PDF endpoint returned 200, but robots permission and terms basis were not established. Publication intent is therefore doubtful for automated collection; human review is required and no further access was made.

robots_evidence: 200; user-agent * disallows /wp-admin/ except admin-ajax.php; preservation paths are not disallowed.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits the preservation path for user-agent *.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits the preservation path for user-agent *.

Publication intent confirmed, but the program page is not by itself an operative data-governance instrument; human review remains needed.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits the preservation path for user-agent *.
